name: Highway Police Chase: Car Racing Game

reviews.review_description: Chasing cars on the highway is actually pretty fun, gets intense sometimes and keeps you hooked. Controls feel smooth so it’s easy to just jump in and play. I like the overall police chase vibe, good for quick action sessions. Would love to see more cars added and more environments to switch things up. More challenges would also make it last longer.

reviews.review_title: I cant refund it wasted 5 dollars
reviews.review_description: It only had two circles as hands and wasted 5 dollars when I could have spent 5 dollars for my family and got scammed

The graphics that you say look stunning and don't it doesn't look like the screenshot The police car look cheap the car you chasing is cheap the traffic's cheap false advertising refund please The graphic is poor it don't look realistic as you say in the title if it look the way it look on the title pictures you got screenshots you got it will look more realistic but it don't falls advertising refund please I knew it was a joke The screenshots looked so promising I thought you actually had something going here like midnight club graphics drove in graphics it looks cheaply made and it don't look nothing like the pictures shows that explains why you didn't have a trailer I'm very disappointed I had high hopes for this due to the screenshot pictures in the title of what it said it does and I don't stand when I was chasing the car the car ghosted through the cars I didn't know the car I'm chasing can go right through the trucks and cars Brock wrecking but if I do it I'm going to smash into a car and stop it's not fun The pictures are misleading please give me my refund back I really had high hopes for this game another trick picture why I read the description of the game and everything it sound like it was it's going to be good you said realistic and all that stuff but it's not it's poor they don't feel realistic I feel cheaply made and a cash grab it's not fair That's misleading Des plains why you didn't have a trailer video you should be honest about what you make not great screenshots then get on the game to be poor
This is a  shame the graphics are terrible almost like pixels .doesn’t  look like anything from the cover I want my money back .
